markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review performance, define paid search strategy, and introduce the new POC.](https://fathom.video/share/_vpTcDX1X24k5ALxxiEzZxSsCaPQyLdp?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Paid Search Strategy:** Start with high-intent keywords (e.g., "best AI recruiter") and a direct offer (demo) to capture immediate demand. Expand to lower-intent terms (e.g., "recruiting software") only after establishing a repeatable conversion engine.](https://fathom.video/share/_vpTcDX1X24k5ALxxiEzZxSsCaPQyLdp?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
  - [**Performance Insight:** Organic traffic has rebounded post-Thanksgiving, and engagement rate is up, confirming content is effectively meeting search intent.](https://fathom.video/share/_vpTcDX1X24k5ALxxiEzZxSsCaPQyLdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1458.0)
  - [**Attribution Anomaly:** A doubling of total sessions (240→486) is driven by un-attributed traffic ("medium = none"), likely a GA4 tracking error that Kyle will investigate.](https://fathom.video/share/_vpTcDX1X24k5ALxxiEzZxSsCaPQyLdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1607.0)
  - [**Team Change:** Carly Piekos is the new GrowthX POC, effective January. Carly has 7+ years in SEO/content strategy, including work with major brands at Conductor.](https://fathom.video/share/_vpTcDX1X24k5ALxxiEzZxSsCaPQyLdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)

## Topics

### Performance Review

  - [**Organic Traffic:** Rebounded from a post-Thanksgiving dip, confirming it was a seasonal fluctuation.](https://fathom.video/share/_vpTcDX1X24k5ALxxiEzZxSsCaPQyLdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)
  - [**Engagement:** Engagement rate is up, signaling content is effectively meeting search intent.](https://fathom.video/share/_vpTcDX1X24k5ALxxiEzZxSsCaPQyLdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1498.0)
  - [**Top-Performing Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/_vpTcDX1X24k5ALxxiEzZxSsCaPQyLdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)
      - [Articles on "AI recruiting assistant" and "how does AI reduce bias" are gaining traction.](https://fathom.video/share/_vpTcDX1X24k5ALxxiEzZxSsCaPQyLdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)
      - [Comparison articles ("X vs. Y," "alternatives to Z") remain the strongest performers.](https://fathom.video/share/_vpTcDX1X24k5ALxxiEzZxSsCaPQyLdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1554.0)
  - [**Scrunch Data:**](https://fathom.video/share/_vpTcDX1X24k5ALxxiEzZxSsCaPQyLdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
      - [**Visibility:** Increasing from a low baseline.](https://fathom.video/share/_vpTcDX1X24k5ALxxiEzZxSsCaPQyLdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1840.0)
      - [**Citations:** Alex and competitors both show low citation volume.](https://fathom.video/share/_vpTcDX1X24k5ALxxiEzZxSsCaPQyLdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1840.0)
          - [**Hypothesis:** This suggests a potential flaw in the AI content generation prompts, as the AI may not be trained to cite these specific brands.](https://fathom.video/share/_vpTcDX1X24k5ALxxiEzZxSsCaPQyLdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1875.0)
          - [**Alternative:** The AI may be citing larger, established players like Greenhouse and BrightHire, which are not direct competitors for Alex's specific AI-focused niche.](https://fathom.video/share/_vpTcDX1X24k5ALxxiEzZxSsCaPQyLdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1941.0)

### Paid Search Strategy

  - [**Core Principle:** Match keyword intent to the offer.](https://fathom.video/share/_vpTcDX1X24k5ALxxiEzZxSsCaPQyLdp?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
      - [**High-Intent Keywords:** Target users ready to convert (e.g., "best AI recruiter").](https://fathom.video/share/_vpTcDX1X24k5ALxxiEzZxSsCaPQyLdp?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
          - [**Offer:** Direct call-to-action (e.g., "Request a Demo").](https://fathom.video/share/_vpTcDX1X24k5ALxxiEzZxSsCaPQyLdp?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
      - [**Lower-Intent Keywords:** Target users in the research phase (e.g., "recruiting software").](https://fathom.video/share/_vpTcDX1X24k5ALxxiEzZxSsCaPQyLdp?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
          - [**Offer:** Educational content (e.g., webinars, guides).](https://fathom.video/share/_vpTcDX1X24k5ALxxiEzZxSsCaPQyLdp?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [**Automation Goal:** Achieve \~1 conversion/day to enable Google's Target CPA bidding, which Kyle noted is difficult to outperform manually.](https://fathom.video/share/_vpTcDX1X24k5ALxxiEzZxSsCaPQyLdp?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
  - [**Retargeting:**](https://fathom.video/share/_vpTcDX1X24k5ALxxiEzZxSsCaPQyLdp?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
      - [**Google:** Retarget blog traffic that hasn't converted.](https://fathom.video/share/_vpTcDX1X24k5ALxxiEzZxSsCaPQyLdp?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
      - [**LinkedIn:** Retarget website visitors, layering on firmographic data to filter for the ICP.](https://fathom.video/share/_vpTcDX1X24k5ALxxiEzZxSsCaPQyLdp?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [**Budget:** Kyle suggested a minimum monthly budget of $10k is typically needed for meaningful experimentation.](https://fathom.video/share/_vpTcDX1X24k5ALxxiEzZxSsCaPQyLdp?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)

### Team & Process Updates

  - [**New POC:** Carly Piekos is the new GrowthX point of contact, taking over from Carrie Chowske in January.](https://fathom.video/share/_vpTcDX1X24k5ALxxiEzZxSsCaPQyLdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)
  - [**GrowthX Restructure:** GrowthX is separating client-facing strategy from content execution. Kyle's team will act as a "strategy SWAT team" for escalations.](https://fathom.video/share/_vpTcDX1X24k5ALxxiEzZxSsCaPQyLdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Kyle:**](https://fathom.video/share/_vpTcDX1X24k5ALxxiEzZxSsCaPQyLdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1930.0)
      - [Investigate the GA4 attribution anomaly ("medium = none") to identify the root cause.](https://fathom.video/share/_vpTcDX1X24k5ALxxiEzZxSsCaPQyLdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1607.0)
      - [Review AI content generation prompts to diagnose the low citation volume in Scrunch.](https://fathom.video/share/_vpTcDX1X24k5ALxxiEzZxSsCaPQyLdp?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [**Carrie:**](https://fathom.video/share/_vpTcDX1X24k5ALxxiEzZxSsCaPQyLdp?tab=summary&timestamp=2091.0)
      - [Deliver remaining content for Donald's review by the end of the week.](https://fathom.video/share/_vpTcDX1X24k5ALxxiEzZxSsCaPQyLdp?tab=summary&timestamp=2091.0)
  - [**Donald:**](https://fathom.video/share/_vpTcDX1X24k5ALxxiEzZxSsCaPQyLdp?tab=summary&timestamp=2069.0)
      - [Review and approve content in the Content OS before the holiday break.](https://fathom.video/share/_vpTcDX1X24k5ALxxiEzZxSsCaPQyLdp?tab=summary&timestamp=2069.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/_vpTcDX1X24k5ALxxiEzZxSsCaPQyLdp?tab=summary&timestamp=2074.0)
      - [Pause weekly syncs for two weeks; resume the first week of January.](https://fathom.video/share/_vpTcDX1X24k5ALxxiEzZxSsCaPQyLdp?tab=summary&timestamp=2074.0)
